title: Manus
notes: General-purpose AI agent that executes tasks and automates workflows, from building websites to running research.

title: Unicorn Studio
notes: No-code WebGL design tool for creating interactive motion/effects, embeddable in Framer, Webflow, Wix, or Figma Sites.

title: Spline
notes: Browser-based, real-time collaborative platform for 3D design, modeling, animation, and interactive web experiences.

title: 10x
notes: AI-powered native iOS app builder for macOS — describe an app and it generates SwiftUI code, an Xcode project, and a simulator preview, plus App Store submission and marketing content.

title: Componentry
notes: Free, copy-paste library of animated React UI components (Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Framer Motion), installable via the shadcn CLI.

title: 21st
notes: Community registry of 10,000+ hand-crafted React/Tailwind components and templates; each ships as a prompt you paste into Cursor, Claude Code, v0, or Lovable to drop into your project, or install via the shadcn CLI.

title: Refero
notes: Design reference and inspiration library for UI/UX designers.

title: shadcn/ui
notes: Open-code, customizable React components you copy into your project rather than install as a dependency; foundation for many design systems.

title: GetDesign
notes: Catalog of DESIGN.md files — written design-system analyses of popular websites (colors, type, spacing, components) that you drop into a project as a style reference for an AI coding agent.

title: CasaOS
notes: Open-source "personal cloud" system that turns a home server (e.g. Raspberry Pi, NUC) into an easy Docker-app dashboard for self-hosting.

title: Dareful
notes: Completely free 4K & HD stock video footage (nature, aerial, travel, etc.) under a Creative Commons Attribution license.

title: Coverr
notes: Free stock video (plus stock photos and music); also offers AI video/image/music generation and tools to "recreate" library clips with AI.

title: Pexels
notes: Free stock photos and videos for any creative project, no attribution required.

title: Pixabay
notes: Large library of free royalty-free photos, illustrations, vectors, videos, music, sound effects, and 3D models.

title: Mixkit
notes: Free stock video clips, music, sound effects, and video editing templates (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve), by Envato.

title: Freesound
notes: Community-driven, Creative Commons-licensed sound effect database run by Universitat Pompeu Fabra, with 700,000+ sounds.

title: Zapsplat
notes: Over 160,000 free sound effects plus royalty-free music tracks; free tier requires a login and attribution (premium removes both).

title: Uppbeat
notes: Royalty-free music and sound effects for videos/podcasts/streams, pre-cleared with Content ID to avoid copyright strikes.

title: NCS
notes: No Copyright Sounds: record label providing free music (mostly EDM/electronic) for creators, requires crediting the artist per their usage terms.

title: Bensound
notes: Royalty-free music for commercial and personal use, free under a Creative Commons license with attribution (or a paid license to skip crediting).

title: Chosic
notes: Music discovery toolkit built on the Spotify API — similar-songs finder, playlist generator/analyzer, genre/BPM finder — plus a small library of free royalty-free music downloads.

title: Texture Labs
notes: Free, original texture images (grunge, film, paper, brick, etc.) and tutorials/tools for art and design.

title: Textures.com
notes: Large library of seamless, high-resolution textures/PBR materials (metal, wood, fabric, stone, etc.) for 3D and design work; free with daily download limits, paid for more.

title: Texture Ninja
notes: Free, CC0 (public-domain) library of thousands of high-resolution texture and reference photos (brick, wood, metal, blood splatters, etc.) by 3D artist Joost Vanhoutte.

title: Ambient CG
notes: Free CC0 PBR textures and materials for CGI projects — metal, wood, fabric, ground, and more in high resolution.

title: Jitter
notes: Browser-based motion-design tool for creating animations and short videos, similar to a lightweight After Effects.

title: Complete Website Downloader
notes: Tool for downloading complete websites for offline viewing.

title: Haikei
notes: Beautiful random shape and gradient background generator (SVG blobs, waves, patterns) for design projects.

title: FontJoy
notes: Deep-learning font pairing generator for finding complementary typeface combinations.

title: VidIQ
notes: YouTube analytics, keyword research, and optimization platform for video content creators.

title: Drive & Listen
notes: Experience different cities through synced dashcam driving footage and a local radio station playing in the background.

title: iFixit
notes: Community-powered repair guides, teardowns, and spare parts for electronics and devices.

title: ZType
notes: Space-shooter typing game where you destroy enemies by typing the words attached to them.

title: There's An AI For That
notes: Curated directory of AI tools and applications for any task.

title: Origin Kit
notes: Free library of animated components for building modern websites — copy the code, use in Framer, or connect via MCP.

title: Spec Kit
notes: AI SaaS tool that turns a plain-language app idea into production-ready spec docs (PRD, requirements, architecture, API, database schema, roadmap) as exportable Markdown.

title: Layers
notes: Curated library of AI prompts, 3D scenes, and templates — copy a prompt and paste it into your AI coding tool to generate a cinematic, non-generic-looking website section.

title: Motion Sites
notes: Library of premium AI website prompts for building animated 3D sites — copy and paste into Lovable, Bolt, Cursor, or Claude.

title: Perler Beads
notes: Free tool that converts uploaded photos into printable Perler/Hama/Artkal bead patterns with color matching and bead counts.

title: Blueprint
notes: AI hardware design tool — generates wiring diagrams, bills of materials, and step-by-step assembly guides for electronics/hardware projects (Arduino, Raspberry Pi, etc.) from a prompt.

title: Kuku Kube
notes: Browser-based color perception game — spot the one square that is a slightly different shade from the rest before the timer runs out.

title: Open SEO
notes: Open-source, self-hostable alternative to Semrush/Ahrefs — keyword research, rank tracking, backlinks, and site audits, pay-as-you-go via the DataForSEO API, with an MCP server and AI agent skills.

title: Omniget
notes: Open-source cross-platform desktop app (Tauri/Rust/Svelte) for downloading, organizing, and studying media — yt-dlp-based downloads from 1,800+ sites plus a PDF/EPUB reader with focus mode and spaced repetition.

title: SpotiFLAC
notes: Open-source desktop app that fetches Spotify tracks in true lossless FLAC from Tidal, Qobuz, or Amazon Music — no account required.

title: OSINT4All
notes: Curated start.me page providing a practical, easy OSINT toolkit for researchers of any skill level.

title: FMHY
notes: Free Media Heck Yeah: large curated wiki of free internet resources (streaming, downloading, gaming, reading, AI, privacy tools, and more).

title: Invo
notes: Social crypto-futures copy-trading app — browse top traders and automatically mirror their positions across 170+ futures pairs on Hyperliquid.

title: ModsNation
notes: Automotive community platform with a 3D car configurator, aftermarket-parts marketplace, auctions, build journals, and curated car media.

title: Flicker Gallery
notes: Library of flip-dot-display-inspired loading spinners; browse the collection or build your own and export to SVG, React, or Flutter.

title: fffuel
notes: Collection of free SVG generator tools for backgrounds, blobs, patterns, gradients, and more.

title: Coolors
notes: Fast color palette generator and explorer for designers and developers.

title: Line Rider
notes: Physics-based drawing game where you sled along a hand-drawn track.

title: Textlab
notes: Generator for realistic messaging/social-media mockup screenshots (iMessage, WhatsApp, Instagram DM, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube comments, notifications, etc.) with transparent PNG export.

title: React Bits
notes: Collection of animated, ready-to-use React UI components.

title: Lenis
notes: Lightweight smooth scroll library for the web.

title: GSAP
notes: Industry-standard JavaScript animation library, GreenSock Animation Platform.

title: Vanta.js
notes: Library for adding animated 3D backgrounds to websites using Three.js or p5.js.

title: Anime.js
notes: Lightweight JavaScript animation library with a simple, flexible API for CSS, SVG, DOM, and JS objects.

title: Motion
notes: Animation library for JavaScript and React (formerly Framer Motion).

title: Bklit
notes: shadcn/ui-based React component library for data visualization — area, bar, candlestick, heatmap, sankey charts and more, with a Studio builder.

title: Skiper UI
notes: Library of 100+ "un-common" animated components for shadcn/ui and Next.js, free and premium tiers, installable via the shadcn CLI.

title: Cult UI
notes: Component library with polished, animated UI elements for React.

title: Watermelon UI
notes: Registry of high-quality React components, dashboards, and UI blocks — copy-and-paste, built on Tailwind/shadcn conventions.
